Set the selling price for your product
How many units do you have in stock?
Provide a detailed description of your product, including features, specifications, and usage instructions
Uncheck this if you want to save as draft
Product Images
Upload high-quality images of your product. The first image will be used as the main product image. Supported formats: JPG, PNG, GIF. Maximum 5 images.
Image Preview:
Tips for Better Products
Image Tips
  • Use clear, well-lit photos
  • Show product from multiple angles
  • Include lifestyle shots
  • Use high resolution (at least 1000x1000px)
Description Tips
  • Be specific about features
  • Mention dimensions and materials
  • Include care instructions
  • Highlight unique selling points
Pricing Tips
  • Research competitor prices
  • Factor in production costs
  • Consider shipping costs
  • Include profit margin
Fields marked with * are required
